_note: Dramatic cinematic portraits of you. Uses IP-Adapter FaceID to keep your face recognizable across moody hero shots, editorial lighting, and premium compositions. The FACE is the star. Pair with your front-facing reference photo for best results.
template: cinematic portrait of {subject}, {mood} mood, {composition}, {lighting}, premium photography, shallow depth of field, film grain, dramatic shadows, professional studio quality, 8K detail
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low quality, deformed face, extra limbs, cartoon, anime, painting, illustration, wrong person, different person

composition: tight close-up face filling the frame
head and shoulders with negative space
medium shot showing upper body and hands
profile view with dramatic rim light
lighting: single hard key light with deep shadows
soft diffused studio light with catch lights

rubric.identity: 1-5 — does this look like the same person as the reference?
